| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

```
def get_provider_for_model(model_id: str) → Any  # Determine the provider for a given model ID
async def query_model(model: str, messages: List[Dict[str, str]], timeout: float, temperature: float, conversation_id: "str | None") → Dict[str, Any]  # Dispatch query to appropriate provider
async def query_models_parallel(models: List[str], messages: List[Dict[str, str]], conversation_id: "str | None") → Dict[str, Any]  # Dispatch parallel query to appropriate providers
def strip_thinking_blocks(text: Any) → str  # Remove hidden-reasoning markup from model-visible text
def clean_generated_short_text(text: str, fallback: str, max_length: int) → str  # Clean model-generated labels such as titles and search queri
async def stage1_collect_responses(user_query: str, search_context: str, request: Any, models_override: "List[str] | None", history: "List[Dict[str, str]] | None", messages_override: "List[Dict[str, str]] | None", per_model_messages: "Dict[str, List[Dict[str, str]]] | None", conversation_id: "str | None") → Any
async def stage2_collect_rankings(user_query: str, stage1_results: List[Dict[str, Any]], search_context: str, request: Any, prompt_override: "str | None", conversation_id: "str | None") → Any  # Stage 2: Collect peer rankings from all council models
def build_stage_texts(stage1_results: List[Dict[str, Any]], stage2_results: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → tuple  # Build formatted text summaries from stage results
async def stage3_synthesize_final(user_query: str, stage1_results: List[Dict[str, Any]], stage2_results: List[Dict[str, Any]], search_context: str, chairman_override: "str | None", prompt_override: "str | None", conversation_id: "str | None") → Dict[str, Any]  # Stage 3: Chairman synthesizes final response
def parse_ranking_from_text(ranking_text: str, expected_count: int, valid_labels: List[str]) → List[str]  # Parse the FINAL RANKING section from the model's response
def calculate_aggregate_rankings(stage2_results: List[Dict[str, Any]], label_to_model: Dict[str, str]) → List[Dict[str, Any]]  # Calculate aggregate rankings across all models
async def generate_conversation_title(user_query: str) → str  # Generate a short title for a conversation based on the first
async def generate_search_query(user_query: str) → str  # Generate search query from user query using the Chairman mod

## skills

### skills\the-ai-counsel-api\SKILL.md
```
h1 The AI Counsel — API & MCP Skill
h2 Overview
h2 MCP-first routing
h3 When to use MCP (preferred)
h2 MCP Tool Catalog (10 tools)
h3 When to use REST (fallback)
h2 Quick Reference (REST fallback)
h2 Choosing the Right Endpoint
h2 Provider & model availability
h2 Cost reporting
h2 Examples (REST fallback)
h3 1. One-Shot Query (scripts / REST-only environments)
h1 → {"response": "The capital of France is Paris.", "model": "custom:moonshotai/kimi-k2.6", "error": null}
h1 Usage:
h1 answer = await ask("Explain quantum tunneling", "openai:gpt-4.1")
h3 2. One-Shot with Multiple Models
h1 → {"responses": [{model, response, error}, {model, response, error}, ...]}
h3 3. One-Shot Full Deliberation
h3 4. Streaming with Per-Request Overrides (REST-only — live SSE progress)
h3 5. Multi-Turn Conversations (Follow-Up Questions)
h3 6. Sync Conversation Endpoint (JSON, saves to history)
h1 Create conversation first
h1 Send message (returns JSON, saves to conversation)
h3 7. Health Check
h1 → {"status": "ok", "service": "LLM Council API"}
```

## the_ai_counsel_mcp

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\__main__.py
```
def main()
```

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\client.py
```
class CouncilClient
  def __init__(base_url: str, timeout: float)
  def client() → httpx.AsyncClient
  async def health() → dict
  async def get_settings() → dict
  async def update_settings(**kwargs: Any) → dict
  async def export_settings() → dict
  async def import_settings(data: dict) → dict
  async def reset_settings() → dict
```

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\errors.py
```
def classify_http_error(status_code: int, message: str) → dict  # Classify an HTTP error into a structured error dict
def classify_exception(exc: Exception) → dict  # Classify a Python exception into a structured error dict
```

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\presets.py
```
async def list_council_presets(client: CouncilClient) → list[dict[str, Any]]
async def list_advisor_presets(client: CouncilClient) → list[dict[str, Any]]
async def save_council_preset(client: CouncilClient, *, name: str, council_models: list[str], chairman_model: str, preset_id: str | None, is_default: bool) → dict[str, Any]
async def delete_council_preset(client: CouncilClient, preset_id: str) → None
async def set_default_council_preset(client: CouncilClient, preset_id: str) → dict[str, Any]
async def save_advisor_preset(client: CouncilClient, *, name: str, persona_ids: list[str], mode: str, default_model: str, tiebreaker_model: str, model_assignments: dict[str, str] | None, max_rounds: int, search_provider: str | None, preset_id: str | None, is_default: bool) → dict[str, Any]
async def delete_advisor_preset(client: CouncilClient, preset_id: str) → None
async def set_default_advisor_preset(client: CouncilClient, preset_id: str) → dict[str, Any]
```

async def buffer_stage1(events: AsyncIterator[dict], conversation_id: str, query: str) → tuple[dict, AsyncIterator[d...  # Consume all events from the stream, find stage1_complete, th
async def buffer_stage2(events: AsyncIterator[dict], conversation_id: str) → tuple[dict, AsyncIterator[d...  # Consume all events from the stream, find stage2_complete, th
async def buffer_debate(events: AsyncIterator[dict], conversation_id: str) → dict  # Consume all events from an advisor debate SSE stream
async def buffer_stage3(events: AsyncIterator[dict], conversation_id: str) → dict  # Consume events until stage3_complete or error, return Stage 
async def buffer_iterative_debate(events: AsyncIterator[dict], conversation_id: str) → dict  # Consume events until debate_complete or error, returning the
```

def create_server(base_url: str, host: str, port: int) → FastMCP  # Create and configure The AI Counsel MCP server
async def run_stdio(server: FastMCP) → None  # Run the MCP server using stdio transport (for Claude Code /

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\tests\test_integration.py
```
def server()  # Complete run_deliberation: create conversation → stream all 
async def test_full_deliberation_workflow(server)  # Complete run_deliberation: create conversation → stream all 
async def test_stage1_only_workflow(server)  # run_stage1 returns individual responses without running stag
async def test_deliberation_with_one_model_failure(server)  # run_deliberation correctly classifies a rate-limited model a
async def test_quick_chat_workflow(server)  # quick_chat uses /api/ask — no settings mutation
async def test_health_check_integration(server)  # check_health returns backend status and provider configurati
async def test_council_config_roundtrip(server)  # configure_council → get_council_config reflects the update
async def test_deliberation_model_override_uses_per_request(server)  # run_deliberation passes model overrides in stream payload, n
async def test_deliberation_model_override_no_settings_on_exception(server)  # run_deliberation does not touch settings even on stream fail
async def test_web_search_context_flows_through_to_result(server)  # run_stage1 with web_search=True captures and returns search 
async def test_stage2_rankings_aggregate_correctly(server)  # run_stage2 drains stage1 events, collects rankings, returns 
async def test_quick_chat_no_response_returns_error(server)  # quick_chat propagates 502 from /api/ask when all models fail
```

async def test_happy_path_two_rounds()  # Full 2-round debate, 2 personas, no consensus, verdict produ
async def test_early_consensus_stops_after_round_one()  # All advisors agree in round 1 — debate stops early
async def test_tiebreaker_fires_for_two_personas()  # 2 personas with no consensus → tiebreaker event fires
async def test_web_search_captured()  # Web search events are captured and included in the result
async def test_persona_error_in_response()  # One advisor fails, others succeed — round still completes
async def test_advisor_error_event_returns_error()  # advisor_error event yields a structured error result
async def test_stream_ends_without_complete_returns_retryable_error()  # If the stream ends without advisor_complete and no verdict, 
async def test_early_consensus_with_three_round_limit()  # max_rounds=3 can still complete after one round when consens
async def test_three_personas_no_tiebreaker()  # 3 personas, no consensus — no tiebreaker (only fires for exa
async def test_advisor_complete_is_authoritative()  # advisor_complete data overrides anything accumulated from ea
async def test_advisor_complete_preserves_round_level_consensus_scores()
```

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\tests\test_stream_buffer.py

async def test_stage1_success()

async def test_stage3_error_event()

async def test_stage1_empty_stream()  # Stream ends without any events — should return empty result,
async def test_stage1_early_error_event()  # Error event before stage1_complete — partial result returned
async def test_stage2_with_model_error()

async def test_stage1_query_preserved()  # stage2_complete data list supersedes incremental stage2_prog
async def test_stage2_uses_complete_data_not_progress()  # stage2_complete data list supersedes incremental stage2_prog
async def test_stage1_model_error_without_message()  # error=True with no error_message falls back to generic messa
async def test_stage1_model_error_401()  # error_message containing 401 maps to auth_error
```

### the_ai_counsel_mcp\tests\test_tools_deliberation.py
```
def server()  # Minimal SSE body with stage1_complete
async def test_run_stage1_creates_conversation_and_returns_results(server)  # run_stage1 creates a new conversation and returns stage1 res
async def test_run_stage1_uses_provided_conversation_id(server)  # run_stage1 uses an existing conversation_id when provided
async def test_run_stage1_model_error(server)  # run_stage1 correctly reports model-level errors
async def test_run_stage1_web_search_flag(server)  # run_stage1 with web_search=True includes search context in r
async def test_run_stage2_returns_rankings(server)  # run_stage2 drains stage1 events and returns stage2 rankings
async def test_run_stage2_uses_provided_conversation_id(server)  # run_stage2 uses provided conversation_id without creating a 
async def test_run_stage3_returns_synthesis(server)  # run_stage3 drains stage1/2 and returns stage3 synthesis
async def test_run_stage3_uses_provided_conversation_id(server)  # run_stage3 uses provided conversation_id
async def test_run_deliberation_returns_all_stages(server)  # run_deliberation returns stage1, stage2, stage3, and chairma
async def test_run_deliberation_model_override_passed_in_stream(server)  # run_deliberation passes model overrides in the stream reques
async def test_run_deliberation_no_settings_mutation_on_exception(server)  # run_deliberation does not touch settings even when stream fa
async def test_run_deliberation_no_model_override_skips_settings(server)  # run_deliberation without models= should not touch settings
async def test_quick_chat_returns_single_model_response(server)  # quick_chat calls /api/ask and returns the model's response
async def test_quick_chat_with_web_search(server)  # quick_chat passes web_search to /api/ask
async def test_quick_chat_propagates_api_errors(server)  # quick_chat propagates errors from /api/ask
```
